item.title: What Happened Today #66
item.description: Cripple the system, then blame the wreck. Trump’s team is torching the machinery of public trust by gagging science, gutting safety hotlines, and cutting off cancer patients mid-treatment. They’re not just breaking government. They’re rewriting history while doing it. Think again if you think it’s all accidental. It’s a playbook: silence the experts, centralize the power, then dare anyone to call it what it is. Call your reps. Tell them this is not transparency. It’s sabotage. Subscribe free at https://govbrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist 1. https://www.cnbc.com/2025/04/06/trump-says-he-doesnt-want-stocks-to-go-down-but-sometimes-you-have-to-take-medicine.html 2. https://www.fox4news.com/news/texas-measles-rfk-jr-funeral 3. https://www.msn.com/en-ie/news/world/ukraine-will-send-a-team-to-the-us-next-week-for-talks-on-a-new-draft-mineral-deal/ar-AA1CoyjG 4. https://www.usatoday.com/story/news/nation/2025/04/06/maryland-deportation-kilmar-abrego-garcia-case/82968566007/ 5. https://www.msn.com/en-us/health/other/nih-scientists-have-a-cancer-breakthrough-layoffs-are-delaying-it/ar-AA1Co50C 6. https://www.cnn.com/2025/04/06/us/national-parks-underground-railroad-harriet-tubman/index.html 7. https://thehill.com/homenews/house/5235016-johnson-strikes-deal-luna-parental-proxy-voting/ 8. https://www.theguardian.com/us-news/2025/apr/06/signal-group-chat-leak-how-it-happened 9. https://www.axios.com/2025/04/06/hhs-cuts-food-safety-services-disrupted 10. https://abcnews.go.com/Politics/live-updates/trump-admin-live-updates-trump-automakers-make-lot/?id=120323605 11. https://www.mlive.com/public-interest/2025/04/canadian-government-behind-anti-tariff-billboard-ads-in-michigan.html

item.title: Dresses I’d kill a man for

I’ve snuck some OC in here of my dress- you’ll never find it
I have this dress but in a darker green
My favorite ever fit from glee
Actually everything Padme wears I love
These aren’t all dresses but they’re browse way costumes I’d do anything for EDIT BROWSE WAY LMFAOOOOO Broadway!!!
I have an idea- I should just become a superstar and be able to wear the most beautiful and glamorous dresses and outfits like Chappell Roan. Hmmm but how to become famous
Scruffy tax
Froggy tax
Liza Jane tax
Nessie tax https://imgur.com/gallery/vSKthkU

item.title: Regulate the market or you are a communist!

item.title: Christopher Brown (trigger warning)
item.description: Christopher Brown I'm breaking the silence around my brother's abuse and suicide. My parents sent my brother away at the age of 14. He was sent to a school where the boys all lived together, and he wasn't allowed to be with his family. As an 8 year old boy, this was devastating to me. My brother was my hero. They then sent him to an abuse factory called Robert Land Academy, a military style academy where you're beaten and broken. He ran away from there 3 times (one time when he came home on leave), the third time, he never came back. After his first runaway attempt, my parents had him arrested and charged (he took 500$ from them), they told this 15 year old boy he didn't have a home anymore and he couldn't come back. He then ran away, laid down side by side with another boy on train tracks, and was run over by the train. He was only 16 when he died, and I was 10 years old. The police told my family it was a suicide, and my parents begged the coroner to change the cause of death. My parents are Catholic and wanted a Catholic funeral, which you can't have for a suicide. It's the ultimate mortal sin. The statement was changed to accidental death, and he had his Catholic funeral . My parents never took accountability for their negligence and cruelty. Fast forward to 13 year old me, I couldn't focus in school between the loss of my brother, my parents psychotic religious abuse, and the horrible reality of my life. My parents' response to me having a hard time in school was to send me to the same military school, RLA. I can't begin to describe the horrible mental state I was in there, the constant reminders of my family throwing their kids away and what my brother endured before he died. My family told me I'm not allowed to talk about him, they've threatened me, bribed me, told me they'll never talk to me and have disrespected the pain they caused him. I've felt his voice and his soul screaming inside of me as of recent, telling me to look for him in some way. I found a video on April 4th that someone made for him. I have no idea who made it, but I'm happy the truth is finally out there. https://www.reddit.com/r/troubledteens/comments/1h476or/escaping_robert_land_academy_the_final_moments_of/?rdt=47911
item.dc:creator: weareheretodrinkyourbeer

item.title: Time Lapse Of The Famous Levanter Cloud Flowing Over The Rock Of Gibraltar
item.description: The Levanter is an Easterly wind experienced in the Western Mediterranean. When the wind blows from the Alboran Channel and through the Straits of Gibraltar, the moisture condenses over the Rock Of Gibraltar, to form a long spectacular white 'banner cloud'. Song used: "Both Sides Now" by Joni Mitchell (1966) #rocks #nature #awesome #weather #mildly_interesting
item.dc:creator: OceansRust

item.title: Dog has unique low battery alert
item.dc:creator: tampacl

item.title: This was therapeutic for me
item.description: I have adhd and was lucky enough to be diagnosed as a kid. But when I learned of it. I thought my life was over. I thought I'd end up struggling and alone, and while that is true to some degree. I thought I'd be able to hold down a job or do anything meaningful because of my diagnosis (I was in grade 2, so forgive the drama) It was my mother who told me of people like some of my heroes at the time Jim Carrey and Robih Williams had adhd and that many many successful influential people had it and lived full happy lives. It gave me hope when I was falling into despair. I want others to know that to. Being different isn't bad, and as much as we as a society demonize mental health. That demonizing is worse than any mental health issue. Adhd has its challenges. But facing it and understanding it puts those challenges into perspective. They aren't huge and insurmountable. They are a frustrating hurdle, yes. But once you climb 1000 steps, 5 steps ain't so bad. Offer yourself love conpassion, and understanding even half as much as you offer that to others. Unless you're a hateful bigot then maybe stop that shit. Ain't no one want that shit around. Have a happy Monday yall.
item.dc:creator: JaceCameron

item.title: My three favourite book series
item.description:
Martha Wells' The Murderbot Diaries series holds a special place in my heart due to the deep connection I have with the protagonist.
Alex White's Salvagers Trilogy is Firefly with magic and technology.
VE Schwab's (my favourite author of all time) Trilogy features a world with intrigue and magic all centered around a multiversal London.
item.dc:creator: AnythingYouCanChurnICanChurnButter
